title: Magda
writer: Harald Braun, Hans Brenner, Otto Ernst Hesse
actors: Zarah Leander, Heinrich George, Ruth Hellberg
plot: 1885. For the opera festival it has organized, the small town of Imlingen has invited a famous singer, Maddalena Dall'Orto, who will not only sing at the local opera but will also perform the part of Bach's St. Matthew's Passion a...
